name: planiq
description: PlanIQ — automatic smart-home / ELV / CCTV / Wi-Fi device placement on villa floor plans

scripts.dev:check: sh -c 'curl -fsS http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null && curl -fsS http://localhost:4000/api/v1/health >/dev/null && curl -fsS http://localhost:8000/health >/dev/null && curl -fsS http://localhost:9100/minio/health/live >/dev/null && echo "dev services healthy"'
scripts.smoke: node --experimental-strip-types apps/api/test/permission.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types apps/api/test/lifecycle.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types apps/web/test/editor-store.smoke.ts
